item.title: The Woman Whose Body Gave Off Nerve Gas
item.description: This episode explores the mysterious case of Gloria Ramirez, whose death in 1994 led to unusual reactions among hospital staff and ongoing debate about what really happened.

media:content.media:title: The Woman Whose Body Gave Off Nerve Gas
media:content.media:description: This episode explores the mysterious case of Gloria Ramirez, whose death in 1994 led to unusual reactions among hospital staff and ongoing debate about what really happened.

item.title: They Were Called Runaways Until Their Bikes Were Found
item.description: This episode examines the disappearance of Patrick Warren and David Spencer, a case that became widely known in the UK and remains unresolved decades later.

media:content.media:title: They Were Called Runaways Until Their Bikes Were Found
media:content.media:description: This episode examines the disappearance of Patrick Warren and David Spencer, a case that became widely known in the UK and remains unresolved decades later.

item.title: The Babysitter Case that Inspired Countless Movies
item.description: This episode explores the 1950 murder of Janett Christman, a case that shocked the nation and is believed to have inspired elements in later horror stories and films.

media:content.media:title: The Babysitter Case that Inspired Countless Movies
media:content.media:description: This episode explores the 1950 murder of Janett Christman, a case that shocked the nation and is believed to have inspired elements in later horror stories and films.

item.title: What Happened To JoAnn Matouk Romain?
item.description: This episode examines the unexplained death of JoAnn Matouk Romain, exploring the investigation, conflicting theories, and the questions that still surround her case.

media:content.media:title: What Happened To JoAnn Matouk Romain?
media:content.media:description: This episode examines the unexplained death of JoAnn Matouk Romain, exploring the investigation, conflicting theories, and the questions that still surround her case.

item.title: The Horrifying History Of Jesse Pomeroy
item.description: This episode explores the disturbing history of Jesse Pomeroy, whose crimes in the 19th century shocked the public and left a lasting mark on criminal history.

media:content.media:title: The Horrifying History Of Jesse Pomeroy
media:content.media:description: This episode explores the disturbing history of Jesse Pomeroy, whose crimes in the 19th century shocked the public and left a lasting mark on criminal history.

item.title: Local Girl Investigates Famous Missing Child Case Near Home
item.description: This episode looks at the disappearance of Mark Tildesley and how a local woman began investigating the long-standing case near her home, bringing renewed attention to the mystery.

media:content.media:title: Local Girl Investigates Famous Missing Child Case Near Home
media:content.media:description: This episode looks at the disappearance of Mark Tildesley and how a local woman began investigating the long-standing case near her home, bringing renewed attention to the mystery.

item.title: How They Found A Missing Girl After Weeks
item.description: This episode examines the investigation into a missing girl’s disappearance and the crucial clues that eventually led authorities to find her after weeks of searching.

media:content.media:title: How They Found A Missing Girl After Weeks
media:content.media:description: This episode examines the investigation into a missing girl’s disappearance and the crucial clues that eventually led authorities to find her after weeks of searching.

item.title: The Chilling Story of Richard Ramirez
item.description: This episode examines the crimes of Richard Ramirez, known as the “Night Stalker,” and the investigation that led to his eventual capture after a series of attacks across California.

media:content.media:title: The Chilling Story of Richard Ramirez
media:content.media:description: This episode examines the crimes of Richard Ramirez, known as the “Night Stalker,” and the investigation that led to his eventual capture after a series of attacks across California.

item.title: He Manipulated His Doctors: Ed Kemper’s Story
item.description: This episode explores the life and crimes of Edmund Kemper, examining how he manipulated psychologists and authorities while committing a series of murders that shocked the United States.

media:content.media:title: He Manipulated His Doctors: Ed Kemper’s Story
media:content.media:description: This episode explores the life and crimes of Edmund Kemper, examining how he manipulated psychologists and authorities while committing a series of murders that shocked the United States.
